zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy於1291年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯奧勒-a奧時，他的父親Jean-Philippe d'Auxy49歲，母親Catherine de PICQUIGNY17歲。他與Isabelle de Craon結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年8月26日在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy于1291年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯奧勒-a奧时，他的父亲Jean-Philippe d'Auxy49岁，母亲Catherine de PICQUIGNY17岁。他与Isabelle de Craon结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年8月26日在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy was born in 1291, in Auxi-le-Château, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jean-Philippe d'Auxy, was 49 and his mother, Catherine de PICQUIGNY, was 17. He married Isabelle de Craon. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 26 August 1346, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy est né en 1291, à Auxi-le-Château, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean-Philippe d'Auxy, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Catherine de PICQUIGNY, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Craon. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 26 août 1346, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy 1291 in Auxi-le-Château, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean-Philippe d'Auxy 49 und seine Mutter Catherine de PICQUIGNY 17. Er hat Isabelle de Craon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 26. August 1346 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Isabelle de Craon. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 26 agosto 1346, nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스
ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy(이)가 1291년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 오스이-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean-Philippe d'Auxy(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de PICQUIGNY(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Isabelle de Craon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 8월 26일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy nasceu em 1291, em Auxi-le-Château, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean-Philippe d'Auxy, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de PICQUIGNY, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Craon. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1346, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy родился в 1291 г. в местности аукси-ле-чaто, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean-Philippe d'Auxy было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de PICQUIGNY, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Craon. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 26 августа 1346 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.
